calendar.matters:
Plaintiff'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-08-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David H. Williams, Esq. of the PUBLIC INTEREST LAWYERS GROUP 510/647-1900 for Plaintiff MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION moving party
Rachael Elaine Salcido, Esq. of PILLSBURY WINTHROP LLP 983-1813 for defendant HOME DEPOT U.S.A., INC. opposing party
Mr. Williams represented in open court that the moving papers were filed in the wrong case. It should have been filed in Action No. 317256 MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL vs. HOME DEPOT U.S.A. INC. The Court allowed argument on the motion. Matter argued and the Court granted the motion and approved the settlement as not being in violation of public policy. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. The wrong case file (317265) was released to the custody of Mr. Williams and he was directed to contact the supervisor of the Court's Filing Division, Room 103, to effect the correct computer entries and to move the papers to the correct case file.
(JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2001 Off Calendar
